rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause/Temporary Retraining Order
rulings.Rulings: GRANT INJUNCTION IN PART. DEFENDANT TO CONDUCT VOTE WITH REGARD TO FIRE ALARM UPGRADE IN ACCORDANCE WITH CC 1366(b). UPGRADE IS NOT "EMERGENCY SITUATION" WITHIN MEANING OF CC 1366(b). VOTE ON HALLWAY ASSESSMENT PROPER UNDER CC 1366(b). CC&R PREEMPTED. HEARING REQUIRED RE AMOUNT OF BOND. (302/AJR/PB)
